title: Elden Ring
review: The Lands Between is the greatest open world ever designed. Every cliff hides a secret.

title: Baldur's Gate 3
review: Every conversation feels consequential. The writing is from another dimension.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
review: Arthur Morgan is the best written character in gaming history. Period.

title: Hollow Knight
review: A masterclass in atmosphere. The world feels ancient and unknowable.
